title: Kevin's Cobblemon Pack
body:
This Cobblemon pack takes the classic Cobblemon experience to the next level with a collection of exciting addons that bring more depth, challenge, and customization to your Pokémon journey. Whether you're a casual explorer or a competitive battler, this modpack offers something for everyone!

Addons:
Mega Evolutions – Unlock the full potential of your Pokémon with powerful Mega Evolutions, adding strategic depth to battles.

Gyms & Trainers – Take on challenging gyms with skilled trainers, test your team’s strength, and earn gym badges.

Pokefinder – Easily locate Pokémon in the wild using a built-in tracking system to complete your Pokédex faster.

Size Variations – Encounter Pokémon of different sizes, from tiny to massive, making each catch unique.

Expanded Trainer Battles – Face off against AI trainers with balanced teams, offering a true Pokémon experience.

With these enhancements, this pack provides an immersive and dynamic adventure, allowing you to build, battle, and explore like never before.

Requires: Fabric 1.21.1 | 4GB+ RAM recommended
